news.headline: Direct Digital Holdings reports Q4 & Full-Year 2024 results, with revenue of $62.3M, a 60% decrease from 2023. Operating loss was $13.2M, Adjusted EBITDA loss of $9.3M, and net loss of $19.9M. Conference call at 5:00 PM ET today for more details.
news.summary: Direct Digital Holdings reported a full-year revenue of $62.3 million in line with revised guidance, highlighting efforts made to diversify customer base. In Q4 2024, the company processed 200 billion average monthly impressions through its sell-side advertising segment, with revenue of $9.1 million, a significant decline from $41.0 million in Q4 2023. The sell-side advertising segment saw revenue fall to $2.7 million, primarily due to a suspension by a large customer following defamation concerns, while the buy-side segment revenue totaled $6.4 million. Operating loss for the year was $13.2 million, and net loss stood at $19.9 million. However, with cost-saving initiatives in place and a reiterating revenue guidance of $90-110 million for FY 2025, the company aims for future growth and profitability. At year-end 2024, Direct Digital Holdings had cash and cash equivalents of $1.4 million. The company also highlighted successful litigations and strategic financing efforts, along with operational optimizations and award recognitions, positioning itself for continued evolution and growth in the advertising and marketing technology space.

news.headline: Stocks in the U.S. close down amidst concerns over Trump's tariffs and anticipation for Friday’s inflation report.
TTEC launches new healthcare digital sales model for cost efficiency and member experience.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 27, 2025, TTEC Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTEC) unveiled its latest venture in the form of a cutting-edge blended healthcare digital sales model. This innovation aims to provide a cost-effective and scalable solution in the realm of customer experience technology. TTEC is known for its expertise in AI-enabled CX and seeks to further solidify its position as a leading global innovator in this field.

news.headline: Simon opens first Premium Outlets in Indonesia, Jakarta Premium Outlets attracts local shoppers and international visitors.
news.summary: Jakarta Premium Outlets® is pleased to invite both local residents and international tourists to its premises. On March 27, 2025, Simon® (NYSE: SPG), a prominent real estate investment trust specializing in top-quality shopping, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use facilities, disclosed this information.

news.headline: Co-Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CODX) reports financial results for full year 2024.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City on March 27, 2025, Co-Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CODX), a company specializing in molecular diagnostics with an innovative patented platform for test development, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31.

news.headline: Kodiak Sciences reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, hosting an Investor R&D Day in New York in September.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, on March 27, 2025, Kodiak Sciences Inc. (Nasdaq: KOD) announced its business updates and financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year that concluded on December 31, 2024. Victor mentioned, "We conducted an Investor R&D Day in New York in September 2024."

news.headline: Direct Digital Holdings reported $62.3 million in revenue for full year 2024 as per revised guidance, expanding customer base.
news.summary: Annual revenue for the full year reached $62.3 million, meeting the adjusted revenue forecast. Efforts to broaden the customer base included collaborations with top sell-side partners and buy-side clients in different sectors. A conference call will be held by management today at 5:00 PM ET. This update was announced in Houston on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Kyverna Therapeutics reports Q4 results, advancing trials for stiff person syndrome and enrolls 70% for KYSA-8 trial.
news.summary: Advancing the clinical development process towards commercialization for stiff person syndrome, myasthenia gravis, and lupus nephritis. Collaborating with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) on the design of a Phase 2 trial for the ongoing KYSA-8 trial in stiff person syndrome. Currently, 70% of the study participants have been enrolled.

news.headline: Japan approves BridgeBio Pharma's Acoramidis drug for rare heart disease, ATTR-CM, in partnership with AstraZeneca's Alexion.
news.summary: The Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare has given approval to BridgeBio Pharma, Inc. to market their drug acoramidis, known as Beyonttra, for adults suffering from transthyretin-mediated amyloid cardiomyopathy (ATTR-CM). This drug, a selective small molecule taken orally, acts as a TTR stabilizer with a near-complete efficacy of ≥90%. ATTR-CM is a deadly and progressive condition that manifests as a restrictive cardiomyopathy leading to heart failure. AstraZeneca Plc's Alexion will handle all commercial operations for Beyonttra in Japan. Further details can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Spero Therapeutics (Nasdaq: SPRO) reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, focusing on rare diseases and MDR infections.
news.summary: Spero Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, Mass., disclosed its financial status for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2024. As a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SPRO, Spero specializes in creating innovative therapies for rare diseases and multi-drug resistant bacterial infections. The company shared its latest financial results and business progress without specifying the source.

news.headline: Gevo reported Q4 2024 financial results, reaffirms business update. Hosts conference call at 4:30pm ET.
news.summary: Gevo is scheduled to hold a conference call today at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The call is set to cover important updates and discussions for investors and stakeholders. Make sure to tune in for valuable information regarding the company's current progress and future prospects.

news.headline: Company 374Water releases financial results for Q4 and full year 2024.
Inhibikase Therapeutics unveils 2024 financial results, new leadership, and plans for advancing IkT-001 into late-stage trial for Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension.
news.summary: A recent development has brought about new leadership and a renewed focus on advancing IkT-001 into a late-stage clinical trial program for Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension (PAH). This move signifies a significant step forward in the research and potential treatment of PAH. The program aims to progress IkT-001, a promising drug candidate, into the later stages of clinical trials to assess its efficacy and safety in treating PAH. This strategic shift in focus highlights the commitment to furthering the understanding and treatment options for this serious medical condition. This development is expected to pave the way for the advancement of IkT-001 in the medical field and could potentially benefit a considerable number of patients suffering from PAH.

news.headline: Senate focuses on SEC nominee Atkins as Trump's OCC pick avoids scrutiny amid controversies.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population has reached a new record high of over 7.8 billion people, with a growth rate of approximately 1.05% per year. The study also indicates that the world economy has shrunk by 4.9% in 2020, the largest contraction since the Great Depression. The pandemic has had a severe impact on employment, with an estimated loss of around 255 million jobs worldwide. Additionally, it is projected that extreme poverty has increased by 71 million people due to the economic repercussions of COVID-19. The report emphasizes the urgent need for international cooperation to address these challenges and promote global recovery.

news.headline: Australia TV: Australia's Prime Minister Albanese is on his way to visit Governor General. He may be about to call a national election.
The Fragrance Foundation marked Fragrance Day on March 21 and Fragrance Week on Madison Avenue from March 18-23, debuting a pop-up gallery in NYC.
news.summary: In NYC, the inaugural Pop Up Gallery and Shop marked a unique celebration for National Fragrance Day on March 27, 2025. Organized by The Fragrance Foundation (TFF), the event highlighted the intersection of artistry, passion, and scents, in honor of Spring. The event showcased a diverse range of fragrances blurring the lines between art and scent. This day holds special significance across the globe, emphasizing the cultural importance of scents and their impact on society.

news.headline: KBRA rates $283.8 million SAN 2025-NQM1 RMBS with 714 loans; 59.1% exempt from ATR/QM rule.
news.summary: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned ratings to seven classes of mortgage-backed notes worth $283.8 million from Santander Mortgage Asset Receivable Trust 2025-NQM1 (SAN 2025-NQM1), a non-prime RMBS transaction. The collateral consists of 714 residential mortgages, with a notable portion being underwritten using alternative income documentation. Around 59.1% of the loans were exempt from the ATR/QM rule as they were originated for business purposes.

news.headline: US Energy Secretary Wright: I'm not meeting with any Greenland officials on trip.

Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin trade sideways. Bitcoin at $87,379. Ethereum at $2,011. XRP at $2.35. Dogecoin at $0.1919. Traders warns BTC Death Cross. Transactions drop by 4.2%, daily active addresses rise 5.2%. 95,153 traders liquidated, $213.18M lost in 24 hours. Germany sold Bitcoin in 2024.
news.summary: Cryptocurrencies stayed in a narrow sideways range on Thursday as investors awaited the upcoming inflation data release. Bitcoin (BTC) traded at $87,379.89 with a 1.5% increase, while Ethereum (ETH) was at $2,011.66, up by 1%. Solana (SOL) stood at $139.47 with a 1.7% gain, XRP priced at $2.35, experiencing a decrease of 0.8%, and Dogecoin (DOGE) saw a 0.4% dip to $0.1919. Shiba Inu (SHIB) fell by 0.2% to $0.00001414. Notably, large transaction volume declined by 4.2%, with daily active addresses rising by 5.2%. Transactions over $100,000 increased from 9,714 to 9,796, while exchanges netflows decreased by 90.5%. Coinglass data revealed that 95,153 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $213.18 million. In other news, Morpheus unveiled a Decentralized AI Forge for Smart Agents, aiming to simplify development, and Germany's decision to sell its Bitcoin in 2024 stirred interest in the crypto space. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kevala integrates with PointClickCare to optimize workforce management for nursing facilities.Exciting partnership in healthcare technology.
news.summary: In Seattle on March 27, 2025, Kevala, a company specializing in workforce management solutions for post acute-care, has revealed its partnership with PointClickCare, a prominent healthcare technology platform. This collaboration aims to facilitate care collaboration and provide real-time patient insights. The integration between the two companies is set to enhance the efficiency of healthcare services by leveraging PointClickCare's technology along with Kevala's workforce management expertise. Kevala's move to integrate with PointClickCare signifies a strategic step towards improving healthcare processes and patient care.

news.headline: The Meadows School is celebrating its 40th anniversary at Fontainebleau Las Vegas, a premiere institution for preschool-12.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 27, 2025, The Meadows School (TMS) joyfully marks forty years of providing top-tier education for students from preschool to grade twelve. The prestigious college preparatory institution is hosting its 40th-anniversary celebration at the stunning Fontainebleau Las Vegas.

news.headline: MOC Imbalance
FHLB Dallas and BankPlus celebrate $499K grant for new affordable housing in Jackson, MS, with 60% set aside for special-needs residents.
news.summary: In Jackson, Mississippi, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and BankPlus partnered with Gulf Coast Housing Partnership (GCHP), Midtown Partners Inc., and local leaders to mark the launch of Noel Place, an affordable housing project. With the support of a $499,000 Affordable Housing Program (AHP) grant, Noel Place will offer housing units with 60% allocated for special-needs residents, including individuals with disabilities. The initiative aims to address the housing needs of vulnerable populations in the area.

news.headline: Spectrum TV Select customers now get Peacock Premium at no extra cost, offering more entertainment options.
news.summary: Spectrum and NBCUniversal recently unveiled the availability of Peacock, NBCUniversal's ad-supported streaming platform, to all Spectrum video customers. This collaboration offers Spectrum video viewers access to additional entertainment options. The announcement was made on March 27, 2025, in Stamford, Connecticut, and New York. The launch aims to enhance the viewing experience for consumers by providing them with more seamless entertainment choices.

news.headline: FOX Nation's "Martin Scorsese Presents: The Saints" to release new episodes, kicking off with Saint Francis on April 4th.
news.summary: Scheduled to commence on Friday, April 4th, FOX Nation will launch the next installment of its popular docudrama series Martin Scorsese Presents: The Saints. The series will kick off with the premiere of Saint Francis and will air throughout the Easter season. This announcement was made on March 27, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: All planes at Reagan to broadcast positions after crash. New policy due to disabled tracking leading to deadly collision.
news.summary: The acting director of the agency informed senators about a new policy following the discovery that tracking technology had been turned off before a fatal midair crash in January.

news.headline: Stocks fluctuated due to Trump tariff news, with Visa leading Dow Jones. Automakers suffered, Broadcom faded. Gold was strong.
news.summary: Following initial declines due to President Trump's announcement of new tariffs, buyers re-entered the market. Auto stocks experienced a significant drop, with Broadcom being a key trigger behind the sell-off. This led to shifts in the Dow Jones Index, with Visa leading the way. Overall, despite challenges in the auto sector, gold prices saw an increase as well. The stock market saw fluctuations throughout the day, showcasing the impact of Trump's tariff news and specific industry responses.

news.headline: Stockholm Exergi announces final investment decision on world's first large-scale BECCS project with Capsol's technology.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on March 27, 2025, it was announced by Stockholm Exergi that the groundbreaking BECCS (bioenergy with carbon capture and storage) project is progressing into the construction phase after a significant final investment decision (FID). This project, leveraging Capsol Technologies for carbon capture, marks the world's pioneer initiative on a large scale in this domain.

news.headline: Voom Medical Devices, Inc. introduces single-use sterile Revcon™ Screw System at ACFAS meeting, ready for commercial launch in May 2025. MIBS CoPilot™ guide enhances Bunionplasty® 360 Repair.
news.summary: A company based in Brentwood, Tenn., Voom Medical Devices, Inc., known for its minimally invasive orthopedic solutions, is introducing the Revcon™ Screw System at the American College of Foot and Ankle Surgeons annual meeting in Phoenix, AZ from March 26-29, 2025. This single-use sterile system is set to be commercially available in May 2025, along with the innovative MIBS CoPilot shift + targeting guide. The system's launch marks a significant milestone in minimally invasive bunion surgery (MIBS) advancements.

news.headline: Harvard study reveals flaws in Meta's content moderation practices, findings from TechScience collaboration.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on March 27, 2025, TechScience, in partnership with Harvard University's Public Interest Tech Lab, published two revolutionary studies revealing major deficiencies in Meta's content moderation techniques. These studies were conducted with the help of the general public and shed light on the shortcomings within Meta's systems.

news.headline: USA has 1,088 existing data centers with over 13 GW power capacity and 256 upcoming centers with $235 billion investments planned.
news.summary: In Dublin, the ResearchAndMarkets.com has included the "United States Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database in its offerings. Analysis of the USA data center market portfolio reveals crucial details on colocation data centers. The current data center power capacity in the USA exceeds 13 GW. Plans for upcoming data centers in the USA involve investments totaling over $235 billion, positioning it as one of the largest markets globally. A projected power capacity of about 6.5 GW is anticipated for these upcoming data centers.

news.headline: SEC ends probe into Robinhood; investigation closed. Details on Bloomberg Markets, March 27, 2025.
news.summary: The recent data indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. The economy added a total of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, surpassing expectations by a considerable margin. This positive trend is seen as a result of strong consumer spending and increased business investments. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a slight increase of 2.5%, providing further economic stability for workers. Overall, these numbers reflect a promising outlook for the nation's economic growth and employment opportunities.

news.headline: UK's PM Starmer opens the door to trade war with Trump over tariffs - Telegraph
F.N.B. Corporation to release Q1 2025 results on April 16 after market close. CEO Vincent J. Delie, Jr. to lead conference call. NYSE: FNB
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) disclosed intentions to release their financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 on April 16, 2025, following the market closure. Vincent J. Delie, Jr., the Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer, will likely present the data.

news.headline: National Fuel Gas stock rating upgraded to 96 from 94. Noteworthy improvement prior day. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: National Fuel Gas experienced a significant increase in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating, rising to 96 on Thursday from 94 the previous day. This improvement reflects positive changes in the company's overall performance. The stock of National Fuel Gas received a Composite Rating Upgrade, indicating a positive trend in its market positioning. This update was noted in the latest report from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Investors flock to entertainment stocks Netflix and Spotify during market turmoil.
news.summary: In the midst of the recent stock market instability, investors are flocking towards two major players in the streaming entertainment industry: Netflix and Spotify. These companies are seen as safe havens for investors amidst the current market volatility. Investors are showing significant interest in these entertainment stocks as they navigate through the uncertainty in the market.

news.headline: Higher tariffs on imported cars and auto parts lead to increased prices for new cars, prompting consumers to keep their cars longer. This benefits the auto parts stocks.
news.summary: In the wake of rising prices, many consumers are opting to hold onto their vehicles for longer periods of time rather than absorb the costs of purchasing a new one. This trend is becoming more prominent as car buyers are experiencing sticker shock due to tariff-related price increases. Additionally, the used car market is gaining favor amongst buyers, driving up demand and consequently benefiting auto parts stocks. This shift in consumer behavior is reflected in the current market conditions, which show a growing preference for pre-owned vehicles over new ones. Investors and analysts alike are taking note of these trends, as they are impacting the automotive industry and related sectors.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: The US is likely to follow through with lumber tariffs.
Los Angeles attorney Grant Riley wins $18M verdict in CO poisoning case against landlord.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based lawyer Grant Riley from Riley Ersoff LLP successfully won an $18 million verdict in a lawsuit related to carbon monoxide poisoning on behalf of a tenant who was harmed. The case, which gained widespread attention, was prominently featured in the Daily Journal. The legal victory was announced in Los Angeles on March 27, 2025, according to a PRNewswire press release.

news.headline: TraceLink wins 2025 BSMA Award for MINT innovation. Largest supply chain platform honored.
news.summary: In Boston on March 27, 2025, TraceLink, a leading digital network platform facilitating supply chain coordination, was announced as the recipient of the 2025 BSMA Supply Chain Management Innovation Award. The recognition was awarded for the company's Multienterprise Information Network Tower (MINT) system. TraceLink's MINT system was identified as groundbreaking for its ability to streamline supply chain processes for multiple enterprises.

news.headline: More US States are eyeing crypto as an investment
Attorney Patrick J. McLain launches new book on facing criminal charges, provides guidance on the legal system.
news.summary: In Dallas on March 27, 2025, Patrick J. McLain, renowned military and criminal defense lawyer and creator of the Law Office of Patrick J. McLain, published a groundbreaking book titled "Facing Civil or Military Criminal Charges? What to Expect and How to Deal with It." The book provides crucial insights and guidance for individuals dealing with civil or military criminal charges.

news.headline: Solvent Direct acquires Hydro Extract Express to strengthen distribution; enhances infrastructure in Southwest.
news.summary: In Manhattan Beach, California, on March 27, 2025, Solvent Direct, a prominent nationwide distributor of pure lab supply solutions for the extraction sector, revealed the acquisition of Hydro Extract Express. This strategic transaction marks a significant advancement for Solvent Direct, consolidating its position in the industry.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: It's possible some Canadian cabinet ministers could go to Washington next week for talks.
Friday FX Option Expiries
Elon Musk hires Eric Greenspan as chef for Tesla Diner amid political backlash.
news.summary: Eric Greenspan, a developer known for creating delivery-only restaurants, has been selected as the company's preferred candidate amidst mounting political criticism.

news.headline: $16.5B worth of Bitcoin options expire soon. Monthly expiry could see BTC below $90K, affecting market dynamics. Bulls and bears eye crucial opportunities.
news.summary: Bitcoin investors are gearing up for a $16.5 billion monthly options expiry on March 28, with $10.5 billion in call options and $6 billion in put options open interest. However, $7.6 billion of calls are at $92,000 or higher, requiring a 6.4% gain for viability. Bears have an opportunity to minimize a potential $3 billion loss. Analysts link Bitcoin's weak performance to global economic concerns. Bullish investors hope for a decoupling from the stock market and aim for levels above $92,000. Deribit leads the options market with a 74% share. Bulls hold an advantage if BTC surpasses $90,000 before expiry, with various price scenarios favoring calls over puts. Bears could strengthen position by pushing BTC below $84,000. Bulls may establish an April bullish trend with BTC above $90,000.

news.headline: GUNZ Network, powering Off the Grid game, to launch next week with GUN token on Avalanche L1 blockchain.
news.summary: Next Monday will mark the launch of GUNZ, the Avalanche L1 "AAA gaming" blockchain platform responsible for the battle royale shooter game Off the Grid. The platform will introduce its native token upon launch.
